metadata.source: Follow-up from Live Register v1 first slice.

title: Bind thread focus to worker and conflict view
goal: Connect live thread focus with stable worker/thread identities and expose conflicts between live focus, active runs, open PRs and repo write guards.

acceptance.assertion: Thread and worker identity fields are normalized and documented.
A read-only view shows live focus conflicts with active runs and open PR guards.
Thread focus remains non-claiming unless claim-next/checkout-next is called.
